questionHtml: Suggest why chemists find it convenient to classify bonding into ionic, covalent and metallic.
markschemeHtml:
allows them to explain the properties of different compounds/substances
OR
enables them to generalise about substances
OR
enables them to make predictions ✔


Accept other valid answers.

meta.title: Suggest why chemists find it convenient to classify bonding into ionic, covalent and metallic.
